text:
The first space feels oddly calm and open, with its plush cushions and minimal look, yet the tilted perspective unsettles my sense of balance. I’m drawn to the emptiness, thinking about how space shapes solitude and attention. 

Stepping into the second space, surrounded by vibrant colors and bold text, I feel energized and curious. 'R+D' promises innovation; the displays hint at the ceaseless dance between creativity and technology. Here, I’m aware of the human desire to understand and redefine our relationship with machines, and I find myself both hopeful and pensive.
